title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How much time do you spend cooking at home?
Do you think people eat healthily in your country?
What's your favourite type of food? Why?
Do you think cooking is an important life skill? Why?
Do you prefer eating out or eating at home? Why?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think the way we produce and consume food needs to change? How?
Is it important to you to eat food that comes from your own country?
Do you think cooking at home is becoming less common? Why?
